subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Illuminator of the horizons and Lord of the two Easts, aid Thy servant Ḥusayn through Thy perfect grace and bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا منور الخافقین و رب المشرقین ادرک عبدک حسین بفضلک و جودک الکاملین و
subcodes.subjects: @disregarding individual capacity; weakness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Mosaic imagery, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
